title: lathyrus laevigatus subsp. aureus
intro: Lathyrus laevigatus subsp. aureus, also known as smooth pea, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The smooth pea is said to have several health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Smooth pea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
